occupation: Global Division CEO & Partner at ALTMRK OOH GROUP
summary:
Alexandre Cardoso has had a prominent role in the Out-of-Home market for over three decades. He is a partner and Global CEO of ALTMRK OOH Group, the largest OOH ecosystem in Latin America. Altermark is an OOH specialist that was born 39 years ago in Brazil. 15 years ago, Alexandre led the group towards Int'l expansion, starting with the US and more recently, Mexico, in an effort to deliver localized attention to the increased demand for OOH specialists amongst clients and agencies.

Attentive to the evolution of the sector, Alexandre has built solid relationships with the industry leaders and has forged direct appointments with clients such as; Google, Globoplay, Coca Cola, Amazon Prime, TIM and many others. In Alexandre’s most recent expansion of the Altermark group, he created AlterLabs, a creative think tank that designs and executes special projects made especially for OOH. Since the inception of AlterLabs, it has already won over 10 prestigious awards for its excellence in creativity for OOH. Alexandre continues to drive the success and growth of the group and this was recognized with its latest nomination for the Cabore Award; the most prominent award within the media industry in Brasil.

Passionate about OOH, Alexandre is an active member of serval industry organizations such as, ABOOH, DPAA, OAAA & Tribe Global.

Alexandre lives between Rio de Janeiro and Miami and is father to 3 boys: Phillip, Thomas and Noah. He is passionate about soccer and in his spare time, enjoys surfing and snowboarding.
